name: Run Tests Workflow
description: Run the project test suite, check coverage, and fix failures
steps: Run `npm test` to execute the full test suite
Review any failing tests — read the error messages carefully
Open the failing test file and the source file it covers
Fix the underlying code or update the test if requirements changed
Run `npm test -- --testPathPattern=<file>` to re-run just the affected test
Run `npm test -- --coverage` to check coverage once all tests pass
